title: Existence of a Substring in a String and Its Reverse
content:
Given a string s, find any substring of length 2 which is also present in the reverse of s.

Return true if such a substring exists, and false otherwise.

Example 1:

Input: s = "leetcode"

Output: true

Explanation: Substring "ee" is of length 2 which is also present in reverse(s) == "edocteel".

Example 2:

Input: s = "abcba"

Output: true

Explanation: All of the substrings of length 2 "ab", "bc", "cb", "ba" are also present in reverse(s) == "abcba".

Example 3:

Input: s = "abcd"

Output: false

Explanation: There is no substring of length 2 in s, which is also present in the reverse of s.

Constraints:

• 1 <= s.length <= 100

• s consists only of lowercase English letters.
hints: Make a new string by reversing the string s.
For every substring of length 2 in s, check if there is a corresponding substring in the reverse of s.

solutions.explanation: Collect all length-2 substrings of s and its reverse; return True if any are shared. O(n) time.
